title: Raw provider errors leak to user
evidence: Pi: [Pi] Groq error: Error code: 429 - {'error': {'message': 'Rate limit reached...'}}
root_cause: pi_agent.py _respond_normie had bare 'except Exception as e: content = f"[Pi] Groq error: {str(e)}"' — raw exception string returned as response, success always logged as True regardless of error
fix: Replaced bare handler with typed except blocks: RateLimitError → friendly rate-limit message, APIStatusError → generic retry message, fallback Exception → generic. All errors print internally (not to response), log success=False + error_type to evolution.jsonl. Same fix applied to the dead copy in agent/respond.py.
test: testing/test_provider_error_handling.py — 4 tests, mocked Groq, no network required
